title: Adding Multiple Tasks w/o Having To click for a new line each time
excerpt: When you add a task in a board and hit enter, it creates the task but then your cursor goes away (at least on a Mac it does). Every other task software I’ve used I can make a task, hit enter, and immediately type the nex…

posts.author: marty (marty)
posts.cookedHtml: When you add a task in a board and hit enter, it creates the task but then your cursor goes away (at least on a Mac it does). Every other task software I’ve used I can make a task, hit enter, and immediately type the next one. Is there a way to do this? It’s super cumbersome when building out a new project that I have to click into the “new task” section each time.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do Shift+Enter and you’ll go right to the next line

posts.author: brieyost (Brie)
posts.cookedHtml: in addition to Shift+Enter, you can also import new items from a spreadsheet if you have a big list to add at once.

posts.author: marty (marty)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Desiree, that is exactly what I was looking for!!
